checks.message: Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: cargo test --lib combat::api::runner 2>&1 | tail -5 (inline runner tests incl. new headless/windowed/parity cases pass); cargo test --test timeline_onturnstart_kills --test timeline_chain_bolt_port --test timeline_validate_typo 2>&1 | tail -5 (S02 fixtures green, no regression); cargo check 2>&1 | tail -3 and cargo check --features windowed 2>&1 | tail -3 (exit 0, no new warnings) (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)

Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: cargo test --test timeline_two_clock_parity 2>&1 | tail -5 (passes; asserts AwaitingCue observed and HeadlessAuto pending == Windowed pending) (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)

Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: cargo test --test timeline_circuit_breaker 2>&1 | tail -5 (passes: Halted at MAX_HOPS, bounded pending, no panic) (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)
